task_completion.description: Verify that a daily chart for MSFT (Microsoft) is open and displays data for the year 2023.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chart window title, tab, or legend clearly shows 'MSFT' and indicates a 'Daily' (or '1D') timeframe. The x-axis displays dates covering the year 2023.

task_completion.description: Verify that an Andrews Pitchfork is drawn using the three specified pivot points (Jan 6, Jul 18, Oct 26).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 3-point pitchfork drawing is visible on the chart. Anchor A is placed at the major low around Jan 6, 2023 (price ~219). Anchor B is placed at the swing high around Jul 18, 2023 (price ~367). Anchor C is placed at the higher low around Oct 26, 2023 (price ~327).

task_completion.description: Verify that Fibonacci Retracements are drawn from Pivot A to Pivot B.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Fibonacci retracement levels (horizontal lines with percentages/ratios) are visible on the chart. The tool is anchored starting from the Jan 6, 2023 low (~219) and ending at the Jul 18, 2023 high (~367).

task_completion.description: Verify that the workspace or chart analysis has been saved to persist the markup.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Workspace' dialog box is open, a save confirmation message/notification is visible, or the agent is seen clicking a 'Save' icon or menu item specifically for the workspace.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the charting software's graphical interface to apply the tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the agent interacting with the charting application's toolbars, drawing menus, or context menus, rather than executing terminal commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the chart displays actual market data and is not a mocked or empty screen.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart should show realistic price action (candlesticks or bars) matching the ~219 to ~384 price range for MSFT in 2023, rather than a blank canvas or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the application's native drawing tools and didn't use an external image editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Pitchfork and Fibonacci drawings should look native to the charting application, potentially showing native anchor points, tooltips, or selection handles when active.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Instrument: MSFT. Chart timeframe: Daily. Pivot A: January 6, 2023 (lowest low of 2023 at 219.35). Pivot B: July 18, 2023 (swing high at 366.78). Pivot C: October 26, 2023 (higher low at 326.94). Date tolerance for anchors is 3 days. The charting software is likely NinjaTrader 8, importing Yahoo Finance data.
